author: anon-2101b8a8
content: All 10 parallel subagents completed. Composing unified gap report now. Segments analyzed: linear_model, tree+ensemble, neighbors, naive_bayes, cluster+mixture, decomposition+cross_decomposition, preprocessing+feature_extraction+feature_selection+impute, metrics, model_selection+pipeline+compose, and all uncovered modules (SVM, GP, NN, LDA/QDA, manifold, semi-supervised, isotonic, kernel_approximation, kernel_ridge, covariance, multiclass/multioutput, random_projection, calibration, dummy, inspection).
